title: River Zombie Pack
description: Replaces zombie-type mobs with my OC, River!
body:
The resource pack you've all been waiting for...

the River Zombie Pack!

[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) (Forge)/ [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (Fabric)

HIGHLY, HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!

With this resource pack, you can replace all zombies (Zombies, Husks, Drowned) with my adorable zombie character, River!

This pack features 3 mob redesigns, two of which are completely unique designs just for this pack!

Not to mention,

Full voice-acting, by yours truly!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/POBh9xDWWso" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
